title: It's a Girl Pink Foil Balloon (45cm) - Chic, Unique & Elegant Design - Perfect for Baby Showers & Gender Reveal Parties - 1 Pc
features: CHIC & UNIQUE DESIGN: Stand out with our pink it's a girl foil balloon, featuring an elegant & trendy design that will add a touch of style to your baby shower or gender reveal party. Perfect for creating memories with your friends and family.
PREMIUM FOIL MATERIAL: Made with high-quality foil material, our 45cm (18-inch) balloon ensures durability and an impressive shine, creating an attractive centerpiece or backdrop for your event.
PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWERS & PARTIES: Celebrate the arrival of your little princess with our pink it's a girl foil balloon, designed specifically for baby showers and gender reveal parties.

EASY TO INFLATE: Save time and hassle, as our foil balloon is easy to inflate with air or helium. Please note that helium inflation will allow the balloon to float, while air inflation will require a balloon stick or string for support.

BOOST YOUR EVENT'S AESTHETICS: With its versatility, it makes a perfect addition to your party decorations and photo booth props, ensuring your event is instagram-worthy. Purchase our pink it's a girl foil balloon now to elevate your celebration.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Gender Reveal Party isn't your style, check out our other elegant options.
